title: Welcome to My Blog: Sharing Cloud-Native Insights
description: Welcome to my personal blog where I'll be sharing insights about DevOps, Kubernetes, cloud architecture, and modern infrastructure practices.
author: dalton-ousley

image.alt: Kubernetes and cloud-native technologies learning journey

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const o={a:"a",em:"em",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(o.h1,{id:"welcome-to-my-blog-",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#welcome-to-my-blog-",children:"Welcome to My Blog! 👋"})}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Hey there! I'm excited to launch this blog as a space to share my experiences, insights, and tutorials about the ever-evolving world of cloud-native technologies."}),"
",n(o.h2,{id:"what-you-can-expect",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#what-you-can-expect",children:"What You Can Expect"})}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"As a cloud-focused engineer, I'll be covering topics that I'm passionate about:"}),"
",n(o.h3,{id:"-devops--automation",children:i(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#-devops--automation",children:["🚀 ",n(o.strong,{children:"DevOps & Automation"})]})}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"CI/CD pipeline best practices"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with tools like Terraform"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Automation strategies that actually work in production"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h3,{id:"️-kubernetes--container-orchestration",children:i(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#️-kubernetes--container-orchestration",children:["☸️ ",n(o.strong,{children:"Kubernetes & Container Orchestration"})]})}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Real-world K8s deployment patterns"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Troubleshooting common issues (trust me, there are many!)"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Security best practices for containerized workloads"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h3,{id:"️-cloud-architecture",children:i(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#️-cloud-architecture",children:["☁️ ",n(o.strong,{children:"Cloud Architecture"})]})}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Multi-cloud strategies and considerations"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Serverless vs. containerized approaches"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Cost optimization techniques"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h3,{id:"-observability--monitoring",children:i(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#-observability--monitoring",children:["📊 ",n(o.strong,{children:"Observability & Monitoring"})]})}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Setting up effective monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Distributed tracing in microservices"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Building meaningful dashboards and alerts"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h2,{id:"my-writing-philosophy",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#my-writing-philosophy",children:"My Writing Philosophy"})}),"
",i(o.p,{children:["I believe in ",n(o.strong,{children:"practical, hands-on content"})," that you can actually use. Every tutorial will include:"]}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Real code examples you can copy and adapt"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Common pitfalls and how to avoid them"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Performance and security considerations"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Links to additional resources for deeper learning"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h2,{id:"whats-coming-next",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#whats-coming-next",children:"What's Coming Next"})}),"
",n(o.p,{children:'I'm planning a series on "Kubernetes Troubleshooting" that will cover:'}),"
",i(o.ol,{children:["
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Pod Debugging Fundamentals"})," - Getting to the root of container issues"]}),"
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Network Policy Deep Dive"})," - Understanding and debugging K8s networking"]}),"
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Resource Management"})," - CPU, memory, and storage optimization"]}),"
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Security Hardening"})," - Practical security measures for production clusters"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h2,{id:"lets-connect",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#lets-connect",children:"Let's Connect!"})}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"I'd love to hear from you! Whether you have:"}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Questions about a specific topic"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Suggestions for future posts"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Your own experiences to share"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Just want to say hi!"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Feel free to reach out through any of these channels:"}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"LinkedIn"}),": ",n(o.a,{href:"https://linkedin.com/in/dalton-ousley",children:"daltonousley"})]}),"
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"GitHub"}),": ",n(o.a,{href:"https://github.com/DaltonBuilds",children:"daltonousley"})]}),"
",i(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Email"}),": ",n(o.a,{href:"mailto:example@gmail.com",children:"example@gmail.com"})]}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h2,{id:"subscribe-for-updates",children:n(o.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#subscribe-for-updates",children:"Subscribe for Updates"})}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"New posts will be published regularly. You can:"}),"
",i(o.ul,{children:["
",i(o.li,{children:["Subscribe to the ",n(o.a,{href:"/feed.xml",children:"RSS feed"})]}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Follow me on social media for post announcements"}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Bookmark this site and check back often"}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Thanks for stopping by, and I hope you find the content valuable. Here's to building better, more reliable systems together! 🚀"}),"
",n(o.hr,{}),"
",n(o.p,{children:n(o.em,{children:"This post was published on August 25, 2025. Got feedback or questions? I'd love to hear from you!"})})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: My Journey to Becoming a DevOps Engineer
description: Welcome to my personal blog where I'll be sharing insights about DevOps, Kubernetes, cloud architecture, and modern infrastructure practices.
author: dalton-ousley

image.alt: Kubernetes and cloud-native technologies learning journey

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const i={a:"a",em:"em",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(e,{children:[n(i.h1,{id:"my-devops-journey-from-business-to-cloud-architect-dreams",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#my-devops-journey-from-business-to-cloud-architect-dreams",children:"My DevOps Journey: From Business to Cloud Architect Dreams"})}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"who-am-i",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#who-am-i",children:"Who Am I?"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["Hi, I’m ",n(i.strong,{children:"Dalton Ousley"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["I’ve always wanted work that gave me freedom—the freedom to live anywhere, spend time outdoors, provide for my family, and actually ",n(i.em,{children:"enjoy"})," what I was doing. It took a few twists and turns, but I eventually found that path in the world of ",n(i.strong,{children:"technology"}),"."]}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"how-i-got-here",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#how-i-got-here",children:"How I Got Here"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["I’ve always been a builder at heart. As a kid, it was forts and woodworking. Later, it was furniture that still sits in my home. My parents and teachers thought I’d become an ",n(i.em,{children:"architect"}),". The idea made sense, but I wasn’t sold on the heavy math. So instead, I chased flexibility through a ",n(i.strong,{children:"business degree at the University of Florida"}),", followed by an ",n(i.strong,{children:"MBA"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["Out of college, I landed in accounting—making just above minimum wage. It wasn’t for me. I pivoted into ",n(i.strong,{children:"digital marketing"}),", drawn in by videos promising clients worth thousands a month. I dove in headfirst: SEO, ads, even website design. Scary at times (I still remember not knowing what a webhook was!), but it opened doors."]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["Marketing gave me freedom. I moved to the Rocky Mountains, worked remotely, and partnered with amazing clients. Eventually, I co-founded a ",n(i.strong,{children:"coaching and course business for cleaning companies"}),". For three years, we generated over $2M. I was the “backend guy”—designing funnels, automating workflows, and integrating systems. It was exciting work, but by spring 2025, both my partner and I felt the pull in different directions. He wanted to scale his main business. I was falling in love with ",n(i.strong,{children:"coding, cloud architecture, and automation"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["That’s when my ",n(i.strong,{children:"DevOps journey"})," began."]}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"what-is-devops-anyway",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#what-is-devops-anyway",children:"What Is DevOps, Anyway?"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["If you’re not familiar, ",n(i.em,{children:"DevOps"})," is short for ",n(i.strong,{children:"Development + Operations"}),". It’s the practice of bringing these two worlds together to make software delivery faster, more reliable, and more collaborative. Instead of developers building in a silo and tossing code over the wall to IT, DevOps engineers create a smooth, automated pipeline that carries code from idea → production."]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"It’s about:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Collaboration"})," between teams"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Automation"})," to reduce manual work and errors"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Continuous improvement"})," of systems and processes"]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["In practice, that means working with tools like ",n(i.strong,{children:"Docker"})," (to package applications in containers), ",n(i.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"})," (to orchestrate those containers at scale), ",n(i.strong,{children:"Terraform"})," (to manage infrastructure as code), and ",n(i.strong,{children:"monitoring platforms"})," like Prometheus and Grafana to keep everything running smoothly."]}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"where-im-heading-now",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#where-im-heading-now",children:"Where I’m Heading Now"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"At first, I thought AI coding assistants like Cursor would let me bypass the “hard stuff.” I quickly learned otherwise. Sure, I could spin up a Next.js app and deploy it—but when things broke, I didn’t have the depth to fix them. That’s when I put my foot down and decided to learn the fundamentals."}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["I started with ",n(i.strong,{children:"JavaScript"})," and loved it. That led to ",n(i.strong,{children:"Python and SQL"}),", where I discovered how the ",n(i.em,{children:"backend"})," really works. Soon, I was diving into ",n(i.strong,{children:"Linux"}),", ",n(i.strong,{children:"containers"}),", and the world of ",n(i.strong,{children:"DevOps"}),"—and that’s where everything clicked. The frontend was fun, but the infrastructure and automation behind the scenes? That’s where the magic happens."]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Today, my career goals are clear:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.strong,{children:"Cloud Engineer"})}),"
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.strong,{children:"Solutions Architect"})}),"
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.strong,{children:"Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)"})}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"These roles combine everything I enjoy: programming, infrastructure, and automation."}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"So far, I’ve:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["Learned ",n(i.strong,{children:"JavaScript, Python, and SQL"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Taken ",n(i.strong,{children:"Linux courses"})," and am preparing for the ",n(i.strong,{children:"LPIC-1 certification"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Spent the last month studying for the ",n(i.strong,{children:"Google Professional Cloud Architect exam"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Experimented with ",n(i.strong,{children:"Docker"}),", ",n(i.strong,{children:"APIs"}),", and ",n(i.strong,{children:"Terraform"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Begun scratching the surface with ",n(i.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"}),"."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"It’s a lot—but it excites me every single day."}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"building-my-home-lab",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#building-my-home-lab",children:"Building My Home Lab"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["The next big step in my DevOps journey is building a ",n(i.strong,{children:"home lab"}),"—a personal playground where I can practice everything I’m learning."]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"I’ll be:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["Deploying apps as ",n(i.strong,{children:"microservices on Kubernetes"})]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Writing ",n(i.strong,{children:"Infrastructure as Code"})," with Terraform"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Setting up ",n(i.strong,{children:"Prometheus and Grafana"})," for monitoring"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Hosting private tools like ",n(i.strong,{children:"n8n"})," and a VPN"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"This lab will be my chance to turn theory into reality and showcase hands-on experience. It’s also the perfect way to prepare for certifications like:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"LPIC-1"})," (Linux administration)"]}),"
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.strong,{children:"Google Professional Cloud Architect"})}),"
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.strong,{children:"Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)"})}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"These aren’t just badges. They’re proof points that I can design, deploy, and manage real-world systems."}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"lessons-learned-and-whats-next",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#lessons-learned-and-whats-next",children:"Lessons Learned (and What’s Next)"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["Looking back, it’s funny: my parents and teachers were right. I did become an architect—not of buildings, but of ",n(i.strong,{children:"cloud systems and infrastructure"}),"."]}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["The last five years taught me what I ",n(i.em,{children:"don’t"})," love (accounting, pure marketing) and what lights me up (automation, infrastructure, problem-solving). Every twist in the road got me here."]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"So, what’s next? More building. More learning. More sharing. This blog will be where I document my path—successes, failures, and everything in between."}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"want-to-collaborate-or-follow-along",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor",href:"#want-to-collaborate-or-follow-along",children:"Want to Collaborate or Follow Along?"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"If you’ve read this far, thank you. I hope my story resonates, whether you’re:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["On your own ",n(i.strong,{children:"DevOps journey"})]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Curious about ",n(i.strong,{children:"becoming a DevOps engineer"})]}),"
",n(i.li,{children:"Or just a friend cheering me on"}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"If you'd like to connect:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",n(i.li,{children:n(i.a,{href:"https://linkedin.com/in/dalton-ousley",children:"Reach out on LinkedIn"})}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["Contact me directly through my ",n(i.a,{href:"https://daltonousley.com",children:"website"})]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"The journey is just getting started—and I’d love to share it with you."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:r}=e.components||{};return r?n(r,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
